top_signals.title: Gold sinks to 6-month low as speculative investors exit
top_signals.summary: Bullion set for worst quarter in almost a decade as Iran war, expectations of US rate rises and SpaceX IPO weigh on price
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Held the Biggest IPO Record. Tonight It Loses the Crown.
top_signals.summary: For nearly seven years, the largest IPO in history belonged to an oil company. Not just any oil company. Saudi Aramco, the crown jewel of the world's largest crude exporter, raised $29.4 billion in its 2019 market debut, cementing what many viewed as the ultimate victory lap for the petroleum age. That record appears set to fall today. SpaceX is expected to price what will likely become the largest IPO ever, raising roughly $75 billion and surpassing Aramco's long-standing mark. The offering has reportedly attracted more than $70 billion in retail…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ahead of SpaceX IPO, Elon Musk addresses ASML employees as part of push into chip manufacturing
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk called ASML a great company in a fireside chat with CEO Christophe Fouquet, as the SpaceX CEO gears up to go big in chip manufacturing.

top_signals.title: How America Lost Command of the Commons
top_signals.summary: The oceans may soon be tolled.

top_signals.title: Don’t Give Up on Global Order
top_signals.summary: America depends on global order—and can restore it.
